title: CENTRAL COAST HUMANE SOCIETY - 211info
text: CENTRAL COAST HUMANE SOCIETY CENTRAL COAST HUMANE SOCIETY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Pays for the cost of neuter/spay of stray cats. All animals: assists with veterinary costs associated with spay/neuter, dental care, large vet bills, and communal cremation costs. Also has animal rehoming listings on website. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 265-3719 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 265-3719 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information. Financial assistance application available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake. May require income verification if seeking financial assistance. AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Animal Rehoming Listing Services Neuter/Spay Services Veterinary Care Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL COAST HUMANE SOCIETY
